message:
🐛 fix: restore modulepreload for charts-vendor and markdown-vendor (#2904)

The previous commit (#2901) removed modulepreload for charts-vendor
and markdown-vendor, but both are needed on the dashboard — chart
cards use recharts/d3 and the mission sidebar uses react-markdown.
Removing the preload created a runtime waterfall that made loading
slower, not faster.

Keep only three-vendor (arcade, 195KB) and sucrase-vendor (dynamic
card editor) filtered — these are genuinely never used on the dashboard.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
